## Executive Summary
**What is the goal of this feature?**
[Provide a clear and concise description of the feature]

## Business Value
**Why do we need this feature now?**
[Explain the business impact and why it is a priority]

## Architecture & Reuse
**Can this be solved by reusing existing code?**
- [ ] YES (Explain what will be reused)
- [ ] NO (Explain why new code is necessary)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Requirement 1
- [ ] Requirement 2

## Security & Risk
**Does this feature impact:**
- [ ] Authentication / Authorization
- [ ] Payments
- [ ] Database Schema
*If any are checked, an Impact Analysis is required before implementation.*
